summary: Comprehensive testing of support ticket file attachment feature. All backend API tests (15/15) and frontend UI tests passed. The feature allows clients and admins to attach files to support ticket messages with proper validation and Cloudinary storage.
passed_tests: ✅ File attachment upload with message works (POST /api/v1/tickets/{id}/messages/with-attachments)
✅ Multiple file types can be uploaded (txt, csv verified; pdf, images supported)
✅ File type validation - rejects .exe and other disallowed extensions
✅ File size validation (25 MB limit enforced)
✅ File count validation - rejects >5 files per message
✅ Attachments display correctly in ticket messages
✅ Attach button visible in ticket reply section with 'Max 5 files, 25 MB each' hint
✅ Download links work for attachments (Cloudinary URLs accessible)
✅ Admin can see and respond to tickets with attachments
✅ Attachment schema valid (id, file_name, file_size, content_type, url fields)
✅ Ticket status filter working (OPEN, IN_PROGRESS, RESOLVED, CLOSED)
✅ Attachment-only messages work (minimal content with file)

file_types_supported: Images: png, jpg, jpeg, gif, webp, bmp
Documents: pdf, doc, docx, xls, xlsx, ppt, pptx, txt, rtf, odt, ods, odp
ui_elements_verified: File preview after selection with remove button
Attachment display in messages with file icon and download link

seed_data_creation: No new test users created - used admin credentials for testing (admin@ecommbx.io). Test attachment data created in existing tickets.
context_for_next_testing_agent: File attachment feature for support tickets fully implemented and working. Files stored in Cloudinary. Test cases cover: authentication, file type validation, file count limit, file size limit, attachment upload, attachment display, download links. The existing test file at /app/backend/tests/test_ticket_attachments.py can be reused for regression testing.
